comments.min_heat_setpoint: Minimum temperature guests can set in Heat mode (degrees F)
comments.max_heat_setpoint: Maximum temperature guests can set in Heat mode (degrees F)
comments.min_cool_setpoint: Minimum temperature guests can set in Cool mode (degrees F)
comments.max_cool_setpoint: Maximum temperature guests can set in Cool mode (degrees F)
comments.allow_mode_change: Whether guests can change between Heat/Cool/Off modes
comments.allowed_modes: Which modes guests can select if mode changes are allowed (Heat, Cool, Off, Auto)
comments.default_mode: The mode to use if guests cannot change it
